title: ajax minor var. erectior
intro: Ajax minor var. erectior, also known as Ajax minor, is a perennial plant that belongs to the genus Ajuga, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ajax minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ajax minor can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, or by using the plant in tincture form, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
